<!-- What does this change do? Why is it needed? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup
- [ ] CI or build

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Include curl commands, screenshots, or D1 query results if relevant. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under an `## [Unreleased]` heading
- [ ] I updated the relevant docs in `docs/` if my change affects behavior
- [ ] My code follows the style described in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] If this changes the schema, I added a migration in `src/db/migrations/` and updated `src/db/schema.sql`
- [ ] If this adds an endpoint, I documented it in `docs/API.md`
